title: Monitor observed comms change
body: Monitor observed collaboration-state change. active claims: 2 (Galactic Transiting Orbit: Fix B-10 comms renderer compatibility for legacy addressed_to narrative events with test-first parser boundary change.; Wooded Spreading Thicket: Persistent non-blocking comms coordinator: monitor active claims, shared comms log, fresh comms events/messages/conversa) fresh surfaces: comms-events: c05d563d-a2ec-4012-b6b4-03caf26ff365.json, 951ed6d0-e80d-4d37-a0bb-68c70b14eedc.json, 5dd6aab7-d517-4a4b-879c-f82f451b66c4.json | comms-messages: ff667506-eb3c-40fc-b173-815b6bec409a.json, ef1c0937-1aa1-452a-b648-36483b9a83c8.json, b06ac719-18c5-4df0-a051-397612e0af75.json | conversations: pr-87-vercel-ignore-test-failures-prismatic-sidebar.json, pr-87-phases-3-6-vining-bending-root.json, ws3a-decision-thread-open.example.json | escalations: README.md Continuing 30-second non-blocking polling; no blocker.
